examples: Perform meritorious service to atone for one's crimes so as to obtain clemency from the people.
She has asked forgiveness from the court but the judges refused to grant clemency.
Three days before Christmas, I granted executive clemency or commutations of sentences to sixty-two people.
Hatley, who was sentenced to life imprisonment, got clemency with his sentence reduced to 40 years.
Hagar joined the cast of "Clemency, " picking up a line or two from Sarah.
